positive: A vibrant, stylized representation of a bioluminescent forest at twilight. The scene features massive, root-like structures intertwined with glowing flora, casting ethereal blue and neon green light. The central composition highlights a majestic, stylized deer silhouette standing amidst the glowing fog. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau curves and futuristic bioluminescence, with sharp, clean lines suitable for screen printing. High contrast, deep shadows, and vibrant glowing elements pop against the dark background. Minimalist, symmetrical composition for optimal apparel printing.
